products.name: Sunny Birthday Blooms
products.shortDescription: Cheerful mixed bouquet with sunflowers and bright seasonal blooms for birthdays.
products.longDescription: Our Sunny Birthday Blooms bouquet features sunflowers, daisies, and vibrant seasonal flowers arranged in a classic hand-tied style. Perfect for celebrating birthdays with a burst of color. Available in three sizes with optional ribbon wrap and a personalized gift message.

products.name: Pastel Birthday Surprise
products.shortDescription: Elegant pastel bouquet with roses and lisianthus for a soft birthday look.
products.longDescription: The Pastel Birthday Surprise bouquet combines blush roses, lisianthus, and delicate greenery in a soft, romantic palette. Ideal for sending warm birthday wishes without overwhelming color, this arrangement suits all ages and tastes.

products.name: Classic Birthday Lilies
products.shortDescription: Elegant lily bouquet in soft tones, perfect for sophisticated birthday celebrations.
products.longDescription: Our Classic Birthday Lilies bouquet showcases fragrant lilies accented with lush greenery. Designed for a refined look, it is a thoughtful way to celebrate birthdays or anniversaries with timeless style.

products.name: Seattle Sunrise Roses Bouquet
products.shortDescription: Vibrant mixed rose bouquet available for same-day delivery in the Seattle area.
products.longDescription: The Seattle Sunrise Roses Bouquet features a colorful mix of premium roses in coral, orange, yellow, and pink, arranged with seasonal greenery. Designed for same-day delivery around Seattle, it’s perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or romantic surprises that can’t wait.

products.name: Weekly Mixed Bouquet Subscription - Medium
products.shortDescription: A fresh medium mixed bouquet delivered to your door every week.
products.longDescription: Our Weekly Mixed Bouquet Subscription keeps your home filled with fresh, seasonal flowers. Each delivery features a hand-tied mixed bouquet curated by our florists. Choose your preferred size and color style, set your start date, and enjoy hassle-free weekly deliveries.

products.name: Mother's Day Pink Peonies
products.shortDescription: Soft pink peony bouquet designed especially for Mother's Day.
products.longDescription: Spoil mom with lush pink peonies accented by white roses and eucalyptus. This Mother’s Day favorite is arranged in a feminine palette and wrapped in soft tissue with a coordinating ribbon. Includes a complimentary Mother's Day message card.

products.name: Mother's Day Classic Roses & Lilies
products.shortDescription: Luxurious bouquet of roses and lilies to celebrate Mother's Day in style.
products.longDescription: Our Mother's Day Classic Roses & Lilies arrangement blends fragrant lilies with long-stemmed roses and lush greenery. Presented in a keepsake vase, it’s a grand gesture for moms who love traditional elegance.

products.name: Custom Birthday Bouquet - Bright
products.shortDescription: Fully customizable bright birthday bouquet with size, color, and wrap options.
products.longDescription: Design a one-of-a-kind birthday bouquet with our Custom Birthday Bouquet - Bright. Choose from multiple sizes, a vivid mixed color scheme, and premium wrap options including shimmering gold wrap. Add a personalized gift message to create a truly memorable gift.

products.name: Custom Anniversary Bouquet - Elegance
products.shortDescription: Customizable anniversary bouquet with romantic, elegant styling.
products.longDescription: Our Custom Anniversary Bouquet - Elegance lets you tailor the perfect romantic arrangement. Select your preferred size, color palette, and wrap style to match the recipient’s taste and your special milestone.

products.name: Majestic Fiddle Leaf Fig Tree
products.shortDescription: Tall fiddle leaf fig in a modern pot, ideal as a statement indoor plant.
products.longDescription: The Majestic Fiddle Leaf Fig Tree adds instant drama to any room with its large, glossy leaves. Delivered in a decorative pot, it’s perfect for bright, indirect light and makes a standout gift for plant lovers.

products.name: Peace Lily in White Pot
products.shortDescription: Easy-care peace lily presented in a sleek white ceramic pot.
products.longDescription: This Peace Lily in a white ceramic pot thrives indoors and is known for its air-purifying qualities. With elegant white blooms and deep green foliage, it’s a versatile gift for homes or offices.

products.name: Snake Plant in Terra Cotta
products.shortDescription: Hardy snake plant in a classic terra cotta pot, ideal for beginners.
products.longDescription: The Snake Plant in Terra Cotta is nearly indestructible and thrives on neglect, making it perfect for new plant parents. Its upright leaves and sculptural silhouette complement modern interiors.

products.name: Desk Succulent Trio
products.shortDescription: Set of three small succulents in coordinating pots for desks or shelves.
products.longDescription: Our Desk Succulent Trio includes three assorted succulents in stylish pots, perfect for brightening up a workspace or windowsill. Low-maintenance and gift-ready in a kraft gift box.

products.name: Gourmet Truffle Assortment (Small)
products.shortDescription: Small box of assorted gourmet chocolate truffles.
products.longDescription: Indulge in a curated selection of milk, dark, and white chocolate truffles filled with ganache and praline centers. Perfect as an add-on gift for Mother's Day, birthdays, or thank-you gestures.

products.name: Milk Chocolate Gift Box
products.shortDescription: Assorted milk chocolates in a classic gift box.
products.longDescription: This Milk Chocolate Gift Box includes caramels, creams, and nut clusters all dipped in smooth milk chocolate. A crowd-pleasing treat for chocolate lovers of all ages.

products.name: Floral Thank You Card
products.shortDescription: A6 folded thank you card with watercolor floral design.
products.longDescription: Say thanks in style with this floral thank you card featuring a watercolor bouquet on the front and blank interior. Printed on thick, recycled cardstock and includes a matching envelope. Ships free via standard letter mail.

products.name: Gold Foil Thank You Card
products.shortDescription: Premium thank you card with gold foil lettering.
products.longDescription: This luxurious thank you card features raised gold foil typography on a heavyweight matte card. Blank inside for your handwritten note, and includes a lined envelope. Free standard shipping included.

products.name: Minimalist Thank You Card
products.shortDescription: Clean, modern thank you card with simple typography.
products.longDescription: A modern take on gratitude, this minimalist thank you card showcases simple black lettering on crisp white stock. Perfect for professional or personal notes. Ships free via standard letter mail.

products.name: Lavender & Vanilla Glass Candle
products.shortDescription: Soothing lavender and vanilla scented candle in a frosted glass jar.
products.longDescription: Unwind with the calming blend of lavender and warm vanilla. This scented candle is hand-poured into a frosted glass jar and features a cotton wick for a clean burn. Approximate burn time: 40 hours.

products.name: Citrus Blossom Scented Candle
products.shortDescription: Bright citrus blossom candle with notes of orange, neroli, and bergamot.
products.longDescription: Bring sunshine indoors with the Citrus Blossom Scented Candle. Zesty notes of orange and bergamot blend with neroli for a fresh, uplifting fragrance. Poured in a reusable glass tumbler with an approximate burn time of 45 hours.

Your weekly mixed bouquet subscription is set up! Your first delivery will arrive on March 9.
Your plant order has been delivered. We hope the new snake plant brightens your space!
